payload.title: fix: rename /temples route to /hospitals across entire codebase
payload.body: The /temples public route still uses the old temple naming. Rename to /hospitals to match the Aura Medical Institute repositioning. Includes controller methods, view files, nav links, API endpoint, route descriptions, and a 301 redirect from /temples to /hospitals for backward compatibility.

evidence: Copied views: temples.php→hospitals.php, temple.php→hospital.php with internal links updated
SupportBotService: regex whitelist + friendly name updated
ProjectMapService: all 6 route entries + descriptions updated
